body:
Lack of Pizzazz Headlines from China

Good morning traders.

+ Market Pulse: After a record Thursday, overnight the indices dipped nearly identically to Tuesday. If they were to repeat the behavior, the forecast would be to attempt a 2%+ rebound by Monday. Today there are hurdles in the way near SPY 746 to quote the S&P. Conversely and since the rally has been extended, the indices are vulnerable for continued testing of lower supports.

+ Trends update: SPY | QQQ | IWM | VIX | OIL | GOLD.

+ Live discussion, available HERE (PW: 646464)
Nic
NOTE ID: 202605150435 | 0515
author: Nic

Morning Note — 0515

Good morning traders.

+ Market Pulse: After a record Thursday, overnight the indices dipped nearly identically to Tuesday. If they were to repeat the behavior, the forecast would be to attempt a 2%+ rebound by Monday. Today there are hurdles in the way near SPY 746 to quote the S&P. Conversely and since the rally has been extended, the indices are vulnerable for continued testing of lower supports.

+ Trends update: SPY | QQQ | IWM | VIX | OIL | GOLD.

+ Live discussion, available HERE (PW: 646464)

Nic

title: 5/14 test note
body:
The 10 year yields just surged. Reasons notwithstanding, this surely squashes the idea of rate cuts this year. Hopefully markets are not counting on those in their pursuit of SPX 8000

nic

author: Nic

title: Market Open Note
summary: SPX is holding support. No chase until reclaim.
body: SPX is holding support. No chase until reclaim. Premium is still elevated, so wait for confirmation before pressing a new entry.
author: Nic

title: NVDA Gap Fill Note
summary: NVDA defended the first zone. Watch the next retest.
body: NVDA defended the first zone. If buyers hold the retest, the next squeeze can start from here. If it loses the level, stand down.
author: Nic

title: Earnings Risk Reminder
summary: Do not confuse high premium with free money.
body: High premium is not free money. Earnings trades need defined risk, clear size, and no emotional averaging after the move starts.
author: Nic

title: Member Room Note
body: Clean entries beat busy screens. If the room is noisy, reduce the chart to the level, the invalidation, and the next decision.
author: Nic

title: SPX No Trade Zone
summary: The best trade is waiting while price chops inside the box.
body: The best trade is waiting while price chops inside the box. Let the market leave the range before giving it your money.
author: Nic
